valid.name: with-using-index

invalid.name: inline-unique
invalid.code: ALTER TABLE t ADD CONSTRAINT uq_t_email UNIQUE (email);

errors.message: Build this UNIQUE constraint's index with `CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY` first, then promote it via `ALTER TABLE ... ADD CONSTRAINT ... UNIQUE USING INDEX <name>`. The inline form blocks writers under `ACCESS EXCLUSIVE` for the entire index build.
